mapper.select: SELECT r.*, d.name AS department_name FROM sys_department_attendance_rule r LEFT JOIN sys_department d ON r.department_id = d.id WHERE r.department_id = #{departmentId} ORDER BY r.id ASC
SELECT r.*, d.name AS department_name FROM sys_department_attendance_rule r LEFT JOIN sys_department d ON r.department_id = d.id WHERE r.enabled = 1 ORDER BY r.department_id ASC, r.id ASC
SELECT r.*, d.name AS department_name FROM sys_department_attendance_rule r LEFT JOIN sys_department d ON r.department_id = d.id WHERE r.id = #{id}

SELECT r.*, d.name AS department_name FROM sys_department_attendance_rule r LEFT JOIN sys_department d ON r.department_id = d.id WHERE r.department_id = #{departmentId} AND r.session_name = #{sessionName} LIMIT 1
mapper.update: CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `sys_department_attendance_rule` ( `id` BIGINT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY, `department_id` BIGINT NOT NULL COMMENT '所属部门ID', `session_name` VARCHAR(50) NOT NULL COMMENT '考勤场次名称', `check_in_start_time` VARCHAR(10) NOT NULL COMMENT '签到允许开始时间', `normal_check_in_end_time` VARCHAR(10) NOT NULL COMMENT '正常签到截止时间', `check_in_end_time` VARCHAR(10) NOT NULL COMMENT '签到最晚截止时间', `normal_check_out_start_time` VARCHAR(10) NOT NULL COMMENT '正常签退最早时间', `check_out_end_time` VARCHAR(10) NOT NULL COMMENT '签退最晚截止时间', `enabled` INT DEFAULT 1 COMMENT '规则启用状态', `create_time` DATETIME DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, `update_time` DATETIME DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, UNIQUE KEY `uk_dept_session` (`department_id`, `session_name`) ) ENGINE=InnoDB DEFAULT CHARSET=utf8mb4;
